title: More Nonsense Limerick 43
content:
There was an old person of Ware,
    Who rode on the back of a bear;
    When they ask'd, "Does it trot?" 
    He said, "Certainly not!
    He's a Moppsikon Floppsikon bear!"
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 43"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
